rationale: The US-Iran deal's oil price effect continues as a mild positive for Portugal's energy-sensitive economy; no other events directly affect Portuguese daily life.

top_events.title: Oil prices fall and shares jump after US-Iran deal announced
top_events.summary: Continued oil price decline from the US-Iran deal provides modest relief on fuel and energy costs for Portuguese households and businesses — continuation of prior cycle.

top_events.title: UK and Japan agree £18bn investment deal
top_events.summary: A large UK-Japan investment deal has negligible direct impact on Portugal but signals continued Western economic activity that may marginally support EU trade sentiment.

top_events.title: Tourist train overturns and injures 17 during Cártama tapas festival
top_events.summary: A tourist train accident in nearby Spain (Cártama, Málaga) is geographically close and relevant to Iberian tourism safety, though impact on Portugal is minimal.
